segments.text: Hello everyone, welcome to our weekly project sync. Today we are discussing the Telegram transcriber launch.
Thanks. I have finalized the database schemas and the Celery workers. The docker setup is also ready.
Excellent! Abdulloh, what about the Hugging Face pyannote token for speaker identification?
Yes, we need to accept terms on their model card page. Once that is done, the token will authorize the diarization task.
Great, let's aim to deploy the production build by Friday. I will verify the bot features tomorrow.
